title: oxalis pes-caprae var. pleniflora
intro: Oxalis pes-caprae var. pleniflora, also known as the Bermuda buttercup, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oxalis pes-caprae var. pleniflora include its ability to help manage fever, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
